title: SuperForm now supports 2 columns

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)
posts.cookedHtml:
New SuperForm update:

We’ve added two features that give you more flexibility in how you build forms inside monday.com:

  • Two-column layouts → place fields side by side instead of stacking everything in one long list.

  • Multi-page forms → break up longer submissions into steps, making them easier for people to complete.

Both are available now in SuperForm.

If you’ve been struggling with overly long forms and even form abandonment, these updates should help keep things organized and improve completion rates.

Enjoy!
